parameters.query:
SELECT
  COALESCE(anomaly_type, 'unknown') AS anomaly_type,
  severity,
  COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM log_analysis_history
WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 day'
  AND alert_sent = TRUE
GROUP BY anomaly_type, severity
ORDER BY cnt DESC;

SELECT
  s.display_name,
  s.system_name,
  COUNT(l.id) AS cnt
FROM log_analysis_history l
JOIN systems s ON l.system_id = s.id
WHERE l.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 day'
  AND l.alert_sent = TRUE
GROUP BY s.display_name, s.system_name
ORDER BY cnt DESC
LIMIT 5;

SELECT COUNT(*) AS unresolved_critical
FROM alert_history
WHERE severity = 'critical'
  AND acknowledged = FALSE
  AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 day';
